text.title: Brainstorming Ideation (Agentic Pipeline) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline run with one persona produces a 30-idea list that all read like the operator's own voice.
antipattern.root-cause: Persona injection step skipped or used only one persona.
antipattern.fix: Enforce ≥3 personas; reject pipeline runs with fewer at validation step.

antipattern.symptom: Shortlist contains 'magic link login' and 'passwordless email login' as separate entries — clear paraphrases.
antipattern.root-cause: Dedup used exact string match, not semantic similarity.
antipattern.fix: Replace string dedup with embedding similarity ≥ 0.85 → merge; log merged-from list.

antipattern.symptom: Output has 15 clusters with 1-2 ideas each — no signal, no prioritisation.
antipattern.root-cause: Cluster algorithm not capped at 3-7 themes.
antipattern.fix: Cap k=7 in clustering; if below 3, recluster broader; if above 7, merge similar.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline drops 20 ideas in dedup/cluster without recording them; provenance broken.
antipattern.root-cause: Dropping logic did not log to provenance.
antipattern.fix: Persist 'dropped_for_similarity_to=<idea_id>' as part of provenance; never silent drops.
